content:
📜 Reframing the absence mechanic with a new literary identity.

✔ Possible Names:
• The Shadow of Oblivion (A slow fade into irrelevance.)
• The Erasure Effect (Like in 1984, where absent figures are “unpersoned.”)
• The Borges Paradox (Absentees become trapped in an infinite library of forgotten pages.)

✔ Effects Stay the Same:
• If a student is absent and their name is randomly selected, the class suffers a consequence.
• Three absences = Specter Status (Ghost Mode).
• Redemption requires a special literary or creative challenge.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ties absence mechanics to literary concepts.
✔ Prevents players from ignoring their participation.
✔ Maintains game cohesion.

📜 4. Running from Skill Checks & Betrayal Limits
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 472 (chunk 472/555)
